channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VPRPL] Anil Punglia Acquires Significant Shares in Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 on April 08, 2026. Anil Punglia, through Tesoys 000, has acquired a significant number of shares in Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd. The details of the acquisition are provided in the disclosure.

  • Anil Punglia acquires significant shares in Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd through Tesoys 000
  • The acquisition was disclosed under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • The disclosure was made on April 08, 2026
  • The exact number of shares acquired and other details are provided in the disclosure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BALAMINES] Balaji Amines Ltd Changes Name of Internal Audit Firm to M/s. Pandhare Bhutada & Co.
item.description:
Balaji Amines Ltd has announced a change in the name of its Internal Audit firm from M/s. Pandhare & Co. to M/s. Pandhare Bhutada & Co. This change comes as a result of the reconstitution of the firm, which involved the induction of new partners. This information is shared in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Balaji Amines Ltd changes the name of its Internal Audit firm
  • New name: M/s. Pandhare Bhutada & Co.
  • Change due to reconstitution of the firm
  • Induction of new partners
  • In compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALAJI AMINES LTD.-$ | Category: Internal Audit Firm Change

item.title: [AMIRCHAND] ACJKEL Expands Global Footprint with Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Singapore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd. plans to establish a wholly owned subsidiary in Singapore to strengthen its global sourcing and distribution capabilities. The subsidiary will serve as a strategic hub for expanding the Company’s specialty rice portfolio and enhancing its international trade operations, with a focus on sourcing specialty rice varieties from Southeast Asian origins like Jasmine Rice from Thailand and Vietnam, and Hommali Rice from Thailand and Vietnam. This move is expected to provide several advantages, including expansion of the Company’s specialty rice product portfolio, improved access to premium rice varieties, strengthening of international trade operations and supply chain efficiency, better connectivity with global markets, and enhanced ability to serve existing international customers with a broader range of rice varieties.

  • ACJKEL to establish a wholly owned subsidiary in Singapore
  • Subsidiary to serve as a strategic hub for expanding specialty rice portfolio
  • Focus on sourcing specialty rice varieties from Southeast Asian origins
  • Expected advantages include expanded product portfolio, improved access to premium rice varieties, strengthened international trade operations, better connectivity with global markets, and enhanced service to international customers

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PARLEIND] Parle Industries Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Approve Key Appointments for FY 2025-26 and 2026-27
item.description:
Parle Industries Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on 11 April 2026 to consider and approve several key appointments. The agenda includes the appointment of a Secretarial Auditor for the FY 2025-26 to fill a casual vacancy, and the appointment of an Internal Auditor for the FY 2026-27. The meeting will also address any other business with the chair's permission. This development is in line with the company's commitment to maintaining strong corporate governance and strategic planning.

  • Parle Industries Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 11 April 2026
  • The meeting will consider the appointment of a Secretarial Auditor for FY 2025-26
  • The company will also appoint an Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27
  • The meeting will address any other business with the chair's permission
  • This move aligns with Parle Industries' commitment to strong corporate governance

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parle Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VENTURA] Ventura Textiles Ltd Defaults on Loan Repayment and Interest as of 31st March 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ventura Textiles Limited has disclosed a default on payment of interest and repayment of principal amount on loans from banks. The default amounts to INR 0.63 Crore out of the total financial indebtedness of the listed entity, which stands at INR 1.63 Crore. The company's outstanding loans and revolving facilities from banks amount to INR 0.63 Crore, with no defaults reported in unlisted debt securities such as NCDs and NCRPS.

  • Ventura Textiles Ltd has defaulted on loan repayment and interest as of 31st March 2026.
  • The default amount is INR 0.63 Crore out of the total financial indebtedness of INR 1.63 Crore.
  • Outstanding loans and revolving facilities from banks amount to INR 0.63 Crore.
  • No defaults reported in unlisted debt securities like NCDs and NCRPS.
  • The disclosure was made as per SEBI Circular No. SEB 1/CLR/P/2019/140 dated November 21, 2019.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VENTURA TEXTILES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [PARSHVA] Parshva Enterprises Ltd. Re-designates Promoter Director as Non-Executive Director
item.description:
Parshva Enterprises Ltd. announced the re-designation of its promoter director, Mr. Harsh Prashant Vora, from an Executive Director to a Non-Executive Non Independent Director, effective from the close of business hours on April 8, 2026. The decision was made at a Board meeting held on the same day, based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Mr. Vora, a second generation entrepreneur, has been with the company since its incorporation and assists the Managing Director in the gems and jewellery business. He is a Graduate from the University of Mumbai and MBA from NMIMS, specialized in accounts and Book Keeping with over 8 years of experience in the gems and jewellery sector.

  • Parshva Enterprises Ltd. re-designates its promoter director, Mr. Harsh Prashant Vora, as a Non-Executive Non Independent Director.
  • The re-designation is effective from the close of business hours on April 8, 2026.
  • Mr. Vora is a second generation entrepreneur and has been with the company since its incorporation.
  • He assists the Managing Director in the gems and jewellery business and has over 8 years of experience in the sector.
  • The decision was made at a Board meeting held on April 8, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parshva Enterprises Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BELRISE] Belrise Industries Issues Corporate Guarantee of GBP 1,38,60,000 to ICICI Bank UK PLC for Subsidiary's Term Loan
item.description:
Belrise Industries Limited has issued a corporate guarantee of GBP 1,38,60,000 to ICICI Bank UK PLC in favor of its step-down wholly owned subsidiary, Belrise UK Holdings Limited. The guarantee is provided as security for a term loan facility sanctioned to the subsidiary. This represents a contingent liability for the company, with no immediate impact on its financials.

  • Belrise Industries has issued a corporate guarantee of GBP 1,38,60,000 for a term loan facility sanctioned to its step-down subsidiary, Belrise UK Holdings Limited.
  • The guarantee is provided to ICICI Bank UK PLC as security for the loan facility.
  • This corporate guarantee represents a contingent liability for Belrise Industries.
  • There is no immediate impact on the financials of Belrise Industries due to this guarantee.
  • The guarantee is a part of the company's financial support to its subsidiary.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Belrise Industries Ltd | Category: Loan Facility & Guarantee

item.title: [SENINFO] Senthil Infotek Ltd. Faces Open Offer from Synfinx Capital Private Limited
item.description:
Senthil Infotek Limited has received a Public Announcement from Synfinx Capital Private Limited, acting on behalf of the Acquirers, Mr. Kolli Murali Krishna and Mr. Gogineni Srinivas. The announcement is in accordance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, following the execution of a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) between the Acquirers and the existing Promoters/Sellers. The SPA, which includes Mr. Pitchandi Chellamani, Mr. Pitchandi Selvam, Ms. Malliga, Ms. P Anuradha, Mrs. Seetha Lakshmi Pitchandi, and Cementeel Constructions Private Limited, outlines the terms and conditions for the sale of shares and the acquisition of control over the company.

  • Public Announcement made by Synfinx Capital Private Limited on behalf of Mr. Kolli Murali Krishna and Mr. Gogineni Srinivas
  • Execution of a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) between the Acquirers and existing Promoters/Sellers
  • Acquirers to make an open offer in accordance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations
  • Consummation of the Proposed Transaction subject to satisfaction of conditions precedent
  • Acquirer will acquire control over the Company upon acquisition of shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Senthil Infotek Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SPELS] SPEL Semiconductor Ltd to Approve Q4 Results, Alter Articles of Association, and Preference Shares Issue
item.description:
SPEL Semiconductor Ltd has announced a Board Meeting scheduled for April 15, 2026. The meeting will consider and approve the unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company will also consider altering the Articles of Association to vary the rights attached to any class of shares. Furthermore, the Board will approve the terms of issue of Preference shares. The trading window for dealing in the Shares of the Company by the designated persons and/or their immediate relatives has been closed since December 31, 2025 and will remain closed till 48 hours after the declaration of the aforesaid unaudited Financial Results.

  • SPEL Semiconductor Ltd to approve Q4 results for the quarter ended Dec 31, 2025
  • Consideration of alteration of Articles of Association of the Company to vary the rights attached to any class of shares
  • Approval of terms of issue of Preference shares
  • Trading window for dealing in the Shares of the Company by the designated persons and/or their immediate relatives closed since Dec 31, 2025

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SPEL SEMICONDUCTOR LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PARSHVA] Parshva Enterprises Ltd. Announces Re-Designation of Mr. Harsh Prashant Vora as Non-Executive Non Independent Director
item.description:
Parshva Enterprises Ltd. has announced the re-designation of Mr. Harsh Prashant Vora from an Executive Director to a Non-Executive Non Independent Director, effective from the close of business hours on April 8, 2026. This decision was made at a Board meeting based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee of the Company. Mr. Vora is a second generation entrepreneur with over 8 years of experience in the gems and jewellery sector. He is a Graduate from the University of Mumbai and MBA from NMIMS, specialized in the field of accounts and Book Keeping.

  • Mr. Harsh Prashant Vora to be re-designated as Non-Executive Non Independent Director
  • Effective from the close of business hours on April 8, 2026
  • Mr. Vora is a second generation entrepreneur with over 8 years of experience in the gems and jewellery sector
  • He is a Graduate from the University of Mumbai and MBA from NMIMS
  • Re-designation approved at a Board meeting based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parshva Enterprises Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
